column1: There are similarities between Canada's and Russian's winters.
The North Atlantic Current is made of air.
Canada and Russia have very similar summer weather.
Tropical plants can grow in parts of the UK.
The North Atlantic Current can make the UK very cloudy.
Differences in rainfall in the UK can be very great.
The highest mountain in the UK is in the west of the country.
The average summer temperature is above 30 degrees.
